column1: # address   = S7 memory area + sub-address in Siemens notation
#               MW71        = Merker (flag) WORD at byte offset 71
# offset    = byte offset — extracted automatically from 'address' by csvparser.py
# datatype  = sint | uint | float | bit | string
# server    = PLC IP address — must match protocol.server in sys_parameters.json
# Tags at the same memory address (e.g. multiple bits in one byte) are batched
# into a single read block by csvparser.py
